languages.text: "Наибольший вес имеет мнение жизнеформы "вивисектор". Запрос на пересмотр субординации не был удовлетворен".

traits.locale_text: "Наибольший вес имеет мнение жизнеформы "вивисектор". Запрос на пересмотр субординации не был удовлетворен".

languages.text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
languages.original_text: "Наибольший вес имеет мнение жизнеформы "вивисектор". Запрос на пересмотр субординации не был удовлетворен".

traits.locale_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
"The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
"The opinion of Chirurgeon Secundaris Vivisector Martinax carries the most weight. This unit's request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
"The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
"The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

languages.text: 「セカンド・サージュンの意見が最も重要である。この部隊の指揮系統の見直しは認められない」
languages.original_text: "The opinion of Chirurgeon Secundaris Vivisector Martinax carries the most weight. This unit's request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: 「セカンド・サージュンの意見が最も重要である。この部隊の指揮系統の見直しは認められない。」

languages.text: "Dirikesimci yaşam formunun görüşü, en büyük ağırlığı taşıyor. Komuta zincirinin gözden geçirilmesi talebi kabul edilmedi."
languages.original_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: "Dirikesimci yaşam formunun görüşü, en büyük ağırlığı taşıyor. Komuta zincirinin gözden geçirilmesi talebi kabul edilmedi."

languages.text: «La opinión de la forma de vida vivisector cuenta con mayor peso. La solicitud de revisar la cadena de mando no se ha concedido».
languages.original_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: «La opinión de la forma de vida vivisector cuenta con mayor peso. La solicitud de revisar la cadena de mando no se ha concedido».

languages.text: “解剖者生命体的意见分量最重。关于审查指挥链的请求未获批准。”
languages.original_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: “解剖者生命体的意见分量最重。关于审查指挥链的请求未获批准。”

languages.text: « C'est l'opinion de l'entité vivisector qui prévaut. La demande d'examen de la chaîne de commandement n'a pas été acceptée. »
languages.original_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: « C'est l'opinion de l'entité vivisector qui prévaut. La demande d'examen de la chaîne de commandement n'a pas été acceptée. »

languages.text: "Die Meinung der Lebensform Vivisektor hat das größte Gewicht, Der Bitte um eine Anpassung der Befehlskette wurde nicht entsprochen."
languages.original_text: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."

traits.locale_text: "Die Meinung der Lebensform Vivisektor hat das größte Gewicht, Der Bitte um eine Anpassung der Befehlskette wurde nicht entsprochen."
